shakshi: The player took position at the front of Castle Azoth — inverse formation from 0030, Lanvaki at the rear this time
Lanvaki and the soldiers held the rear while the player faced the frontal assault
The player successfully defended the frontal assault — the castle gates held
The Assassin order took a significant loss at Castle Azoth — the assault broken at the gates
The castle held for Nexiott's line — the defense completed
Asmoth led the assault — the man who forgave without forgetting, now the enemy at the gate
Hue was in the assault — the same man who invited the player to camp at the western plateau edge in 0011
Nexiott lives adjacent to the castle in the noble district — not in the castle itself. The castle defense and the eventual deathtrap are separate locations.
